# signIn

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the signIn mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk sign-in --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.credentialKind <String> --input.csrfToken <String> --input.deviceToken <String> --input.email <String> --input.password <String> --input.rememberMe <Boolean>
```

## Examples

### Run signIn

```bash
csdk sign-in --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.credentialKind <String> --input.csrfToken <String> --input.deviceToken <String> --input.email <String> --input.password <String> --input.rememberMe <Boolean>
```
